name: @forwardimpact/libsyntheticprose
description: LLM-generated prose and YAML — realistic evaluation content so agent improvements are tested against lifelike data.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Eval fixtures read like lorem ipsum and agents are tested against content nothing like what they meet in production.
jobs.bigHire: fill the entity graph with realistic LLM-generated prose and YAML so agents are tested against lifelike data.
jobs.littleHire: generate realistic content for an entity without writing prompts or cleaning up the output by hand.
jobs.competesWith: lorem ipsum fixtures; hand-written sample content; testing against unrealistic data
